title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 13–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Kaido, Kinemon as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I want you to fight alongside me!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Huh!? You said you were Kaido's son!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kozuki Oden was a man, right? So I became a man, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really are strong!! And you haven't even gotten serious yet...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 9 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
